mapper.insert: INSERT INTO companies (name, domain, company_type, size, logo_url, logo_source_url, logo_status, logo_updated_at, created_at) VALUES ( #{companyName}, #{companyDomain}, #{companyType}, #{companySize}, #{companyLogoUrl}, #{logoSourceUrl}, #{logoStatus}, CASE WHEN #{companyLogoUrl} IS NULL THEN NULL ELSE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP END, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP ) ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE id = LAST_INSERT_ID(id), domain = COALESCE(domain, VALUES(domain)), company_type = COALESCE(company_type, VALUES(company_type)), size = COALESCE(size, VALUES(size)), logo_source_url = IF(logo_url IS NULL AND VALUES(logo_url) IS NOT NULL, VALUES(logo_source_url), logo_source_url), logo_status = IF(logo_url IS NULL AND VALUES(logo_url) IS NOT NULL, VALUES(logo_status), logo_status), logo_updated_at = IF(logo_url IS NULL AND VALUES(logo_url) IS NOT NULL, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, logo_updated_at), logo_url = IF(logo_url IS NULL, VALUES(logo_url), logo_url)

INSERT INTO company_info_sources (company_id, source_name, source_url, status, collected_at, created_at) VALUES (#{companyId}, #{sourceName}, #{sourceUrl}, #{status}, NULL, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP) ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE source_name = VALUES(source_name), status = VALUES(status)

INSERT INTO jobs (company_id, title, role, deadline_label, source, url, created_at) VALUES (#{companyId}, #{positionTitle}, #{positionTitle}, #{deadlineLabel}, 'DIRECT', #{sourceUrl}, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP)
mapper.update: UPDATE jobs SET company_id = #{companyId}, title = #{positionTitle}, role = #{positionTitle}, deadline_label = #{deadlineLabel}, url = #{sourceUrl} WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.select: SELECT bj.id, bj.user_id, bj.job_id, w.id AS workspace_id, c.name AS company_name, j.title AS position_title, bj.application_status, j.deadline_label, CASE WHEN j.deadline_label LIKE '오늘%' OR j.deadline_label LIKE 'D-%' THEN TRUE ELSE FALSE END AS deadline_soon, c.logo_url AS company_logo_url, j.url AS source_url, bj.application_memo FROM basket_jobs bj JOIN jobs j ON j.id = bj.job_id JOIN companies c ON c.id = j.company_id LEFT JOIN workspaces w ON w.basket_job_id = bj.id WHERE bj.user_id = #{userId} AND bj.deleted_at IS NULL AND j.url = #{sourceUrl} AND j.title = #{positionTitle} LIMIT 1
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO basket_jobs (user_id, job_id, application_status, application_memo, status_updated_at, status_reason, saved_source, created_at) VALUES (#{userId}, #{jobId}, #{applicationStatus}, COALESCE(#{applicationMemo}, ''), CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, 'USER_SET', 'DIRECT', CURRENT_TIMESTAMP)
INSERT INTO workspaces (user_id, basket_job_id, created_at, updated_at) VALUES (#{userId}, #{basketJobId}, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP)
INSERT INTO essay_questions (workspace_id, question_text, max_length, sort_order, created_at) VALUES (#{workspaceId}, #{prompt}, #{maxLength}, 1, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP)
INSERT INTO essay_drafts (workspace_id, question_id, body, save_revision, client_updated_at, auto_saved_at) VALUES (#{workspaceId}, #{id}, #{draft}, 1, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP)

INSERT INTO reference_materials (workspace_id, board_name, reference_type, title, body, url, display_mode, created_at) VALUES (#{workspaceId}, #{boardName}, #{referenceType}, #{title}, #{body}, #{url}, 'BOTH', CURRENT_TIMESTAMP)
mapper.select:
SELECT bj.id, bj.user_id, bj.job_id, w.id AS workspace_id, c.name AS company_name, j.title AS position_title, bj.application_status, j.deadline_label, CASE WHEN j.deadline_label LIKE '오늘%' OR j.deadline_label LIKE 'D-%' THEN TRUE ELSE FALSE END AS deadline_soon, c.logo_url AS company_logo_url, j.url AS source_url, bj.application_memo FROM basket_jobs bj JOIN jobs j ON j.id = bj.job_id JOIN companies c ON c.id = j.company_id LEFT JOIN workspaces w ON w.basket_job_id = bj.id WHERE bj.user_id = #{userId} AND bj.deleted_at IS NULL AND bj.application_status = #{status} ORDER BY
deadline_soon DESC, bj.id ASC bj.id ASC

SELECT bj.id, bj.user_id, bj.job_id, w.id AS workspace_id, c.name AS company_name, j.title AS position_title, bj.application_status, j.deadline_label, CASE WHEN j.deadline_label LIKE '오늘%' OR j.deadline_label LIKE 'D-%' THEN TRUE ELSE FALSE END AS deadline_soon, c.logo_url AS company_logo_url, j.url AS source_url, bj.application_memo FROM basket_jobs bj JOIN jobs j ON j.id = bj.job_id JOIN companies c ON c.id = j.company_id LEFT JOIN workspaces w ON w.basket_job_id = bj.id WHERE bj.user_id = #{userId} AND bj.id = #{basketJobId} AND bj.deleted_at IS NULL
SELECT bj.user_id FROM basket_jobs bj WHERE bj.id = #{basketJobId} AND bj.deleted_at IS NULL
mapper.update: UPDATE basket_jobs SET application_status = #{status}, status_updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, status_reason = 'USER_SET' WHERE id = #{basketJobId} AND user_id = #{userId} AND deleted_at IS NULL
UPDATE basket_jobs SET application_memo = COALESCE(#{applicationMemo}, '') WHERE id = #{basketJobId} AND user_id = #{userId} AND deleted_at IS NULL

UPDATE basket_jobs SET application_status = 'IN_PROGRESS', status_updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, status_reason = 'USER_SET' WHERE id = #{basketJobId} AND user_id = #{userId} AND deleted_at IS NULL AND application_status NOT IN ('IN_PROGRESS', 'COMPLETED')

UPDATE basket_jobs bj JOIN workspaces w ON w.basket_job_id = bj.id SET bj.application_status = 'IN_PROGRESS', bj.status_updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, bj.status_reason = 'USER_SET' WHERE w.id = #{workspaceId} AND w.user_id = #{userId} AND bj.deleted_at IS NULL AND bj.application_status NOT IN ('IN_PROGRESS', 'COMPLETED')
UPDATE basket_jobs SET deleted_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE id = #{basketJobId} AND user_id = #{userId} AND deleted_at IS NULL
mapper.select: SELECT w.id, w.user_id, w.basket_job_id, c.name AS company_name, j.title AS position_title, j.deadline_label, bj.application_status, j.url AS source_url, c.domain AS company_domain, c.company_type, c.size AS company_size, c.logo_url AS company_logo_url, c.rating AS company_rating, c.starting_salary AS company_starting_salary, 'unverified' AS company_financial_status FROM workspaces w JOIN basket_jobs bj ON bj.id = w.basket_job_id JOIN jobs j ON j.id = bj.job_id JOIN companies c ON c.id = j.company_id WHERE w.user_id = #{userId} AND w.id = #{workspaceId} AND bj.deleted_at IS NULL
SELECT w.user_id FROM workspaces w JOIN basket_jobs bj ON bj.id = w.basket_job_id WHERE w.id = #{workspaceId} AND bj.deleted_at IS NULL

SELECT q.id, q.workspace_id, q.question_text AS prompt, COALESCE(d.body, '') AS draft, q.max_length FROM essay_questions q LEFT JOIN essay_drafts d ON d.question_id = q.id WHERE q.workspace_id = #{workspaceId} ORDER BY q.sort_order ASC, q.id ASC

SELECT q.id, q.workspace_id, q.question_text AS prompt, COALESCE(d.body, '') AS draft, q.max_length FROM essay_questions q LEFT JOIN essay_drafts d ON d.question_id = q.id WHERE q.workspace_id = #{workspaceId} AND q.id = #{questionId}
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM essay_versions WHERE workspace_id = #{workspaceId} AND question_id = #{questionId}
DELETE FROM essay_drafts WHERE workspace_id = #{workspaceId} AND question_id = #{questionId}
DELETE FROM essay_questions WHERE workspace_id = #{workspaceId} AND id = #{questionId}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO essay_versions (workspace_id, question_id, version_name, body, created_at) VALUES (#{workspaceId}, #{questionId}, #{versionName}, #{body}, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP)
mapper.select: SELECT v.id, w.user_id, v.workspace_id, v.question_id, v.version_name, v.body FROM essay_versions v JOIN workspaces w ON w.id = v.workspace_id WHERE w.user_id = #{userId} AND v.workspace_id = #{workspaceId} ORDER BY v.id ASC

SELECT v.id, w.user_id, v.workspace_id, v.question_id, v.version_name, v.body FROM essay_versions v JOIN workspaces w ON w.id = v.workspace_id WHERE w.user_id = #{userId} AND v.workspace_id = #{workspaceId} AND v.id = #{versionId}

SELECT r.id, w.user_id, r.workspace_id, r.board_name, r.reference_type, r.title, r.body, r.url FROM reference_materials r JOIN workspaces w ON w.id = r.workspace_id WHERE r.workspace_id = #{workspaceId} AND r.deleted_at IS NULL ORDER BY r.id ASC

SELECT r.id, w.user_id, r.workspace_id, r.board_name, r.reference_type, r.title, r.body, r.url FROM reference_materials r JOIN workspaces w ON w.id = r.workspace_id WHERE w.user_id = #{userId} AND r.id = #{referenceId} AND r.deleted_at IS NULL

SELECT w.user_id FROM reference_materials r JOIN workspaces w ON w.id = r.workspace_id JOIN basket_jobs bj ON bj.id = w.basket_job_id WHERE r.id = #{referenceId} AND r.deleted_at IS NULL AND bj.deleted_at IS NULL
mapper.update: UPDATE reference_materials r JOIN workspaces w ON w.id = r.workspace_id SET r.board_name = #{boardName}, r.reference_type = #{referenceType}, r.title = #{title}, r.body = #{body}, r.url = #{url} WHERE r.id = #{id} AND w.user_id = #{userId} AND r.deleted_at IS NULL
UPDATE reference_materials r JOIN workspaces w ON w.id = r.workspace_id SET r.deleted_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE r.id = #{referenceId} AND w.user_id = #{userId} AND r.deleted_at IS NULL
